name: The First Tranquility of the Storm

system.description:
Discipline: Qinggong
Skill: Athletics
Type: Normal, Counter
Qi: 2

In order to use this Technique, it must be raining. You dart quickly from side to side, never being touched by raindrops. As a normal Technique, to avoid the drops, make an Athletics roll TN 6. This affords you +1 to Evade for the quick movement and +1 to Stealth because people will hear the rain, and you will not be trudging through it. However, as you must move constantly, you must reuse this Technique each time it is your turn to continue its effect. This can also be used as a Counter to the Third Tranquility of the Storm. When used in this way, if your Athletics roll meets or exceeds the opponent’s initial Speed roll, you avoid their raindrops as well and take no Damage. Cathartic: When used Normally, the duration becomes 10 minutes, so you do not have to repeatedly roll until it ends. When used as a Counter, if you successfully dodge and have a fan, you may redirect the raindrops at a target of your choice (can be the original attacker, but does not have to be). Use the original Attack’s Speed roll to hit, and if it works, do the original attacker’s Damage.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
